title: Mirror Laser
description: Mirror laser: hit the yellow receptor with the beam from the orange emitter (beam starts one grid step in the emitter facing direction, usually east). Place or cycle purple mirrors with ACTION6 using display x,y (64x64, cell centers). Mirrors go on empty floor only; clicking walls, emitter, receptor, player, or off-grid wastes a step. ACTION5 fires once per step. ACTION1–4 no-op (free). Lose when the step budget (cyan HUD ticks) hits zero. Blue player tile is static and the beam passes through it.
